prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Weichai WP13.550E** (engine code: **WP13.550E**) with a **Garrett GT4202** turbocharger (84mm compressor, 1.15 A/R turbine housing) and **Precision Turbo 46mm wastegate** for 550+ HP at 1.5 bar boost, paired with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** for full flex-fuel (E85) mapping and closed-loop lambda control

Full **TANK 500-specific** drivetrain reinforcement: **Quaife ATB differential** (80% lock) in the rear axle, **South Bend Clutch Stage 3** twin-disc setup (360mm) with **Tilton hydraulic release bearing**, and **GKN VL300 CV joints** for 600+ Nm torque handling

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** (24-way rebound, 22-way compression damping) and **TANK 500-specific** **SuperPro polybushings** (part #SPF0123-500) for subframe and control arms, paired with **Brembo GT 380mm 6-piston front/355mm 4-piston rear** big brake kit with **Ferodo DS2500 pads**
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (TANK 500-specific, 50mm front/60mm rear fender flares) with **custom carbon fiber hood** (vented, 30% weight reduction) and **Seibon carbon fiber rear diffuser** (integrated tow hooks, part #CF-TANK500-DIFF)

**Vorsteiner V-FF107 22x12 ET15 forged wheels** (matte bronze, 5x139.7 PCD) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (305/30R22) with **H&R Trak+ 35mm spacers** for flush fitment, paired with **AP Racing RS brake ducts** (carbon fiber, part #AP-RS-TANK500)

**Custom LED lighting package**: **Lux H8 Angel Eyes** (6000K, 120W) with **Morimoto XB35 HID projectors**, **Diode Dynamics SS3 sequential turn signals**, and **TANK 500-specific** **Carbonio CAI intake system** (heat-shielded, part #CAI-TANK500) with **red anodized intake piping**
